voting.intro: Rate the plans below. Your votes help decide what gets built next.
voting.importance: How important is it to you?
voting.error: Your vote was not saved. Try again.

shipped.title: Already built
shipped.subtitle: Things from the roadmap that are now live in the game.

admin.markShippedConfirm: Move this item to "Already built"? Players will see it in the history section and can no longer vote on it.
admin.markActiveConfirm: Move this item back to the active roadmap? Players will be able to vote on it again.
admin.missingFields: Fill in both titles before adding.

races.title: Races
races.today: A full season calendar with scheduled races, results, standings, prize money and history.
next: A race engine built for stories: stage drama you can follow, discuss and brag about.
Livelier race reports, on the way to following races as they unfold.
Tactics and rider form that actually shape outcomes, without hiding why.

training.title: Training
training.today: Training focus is live: a season-long focus and intensity on your key riders, with real trade-offs.
next: Real training depth: programs for individual riders, not just a single focus.
Long-term development you can see and steer, season over season.
Meaningful choices with consequences, never spreadsheet homework.

youth.title: Youth development
youth.today: Scouting is live: uncover a rider's hidden potential with limited scout slots and estimates personal to your team.
next: Youth academies: your own next generation growing up through the club.
Young riders you discovered, developed and made your stars.
Generational renewal, so your club has a future beyond its current squad.

market.title: Transfers & auctions
market.today: The strongest part of the game right now: live auctions, autobids, transfers, loans and negotiations between managers.
next: A market that tells stories: rumors, rivalries and big moves the whole world talks about.

club.title: Club & world
club.today: A demanding board with real goals, club finances with loans and consequences, and a shared world of managers.
next: Earn renown: wins, records and history that build your club's reputation in the world.
Road captains and mentors: riders who lift the team around them.
Build your staff: sports directors, coaches and doctors who shape how your club works.
A club museum: champions, legendary riders and the races people still talk about.
Friends and following: follow managers and riders across the world.
